ground_truth.title: TurboTax Expert Full Service | Get a Tax Expert to File Your Taxes
ground_truth.main_content: TurboTax Expert Full Service offers tax experts who will file your taxes for you. For $150, all tax situations are included when you file by 2/28. You can meet with a local expert in person or work with one online. Experts will get every tax break you deserve and your taxes done 100% right—guaranteed. Once you find a tax expert who understands your needs, you can work with the same trusted expert year after year. Unlimited tax help is available whenever you need it, even on nights and weekends during tax season. The service includes a matching process to find an expert specialized in your specific tax situation including stocks, crypto, property tax, and dependent credits. Getting started involves matching with an expert, seeing your price upfront, handing off your documents to your expert, getting support on your schedule, and having your expert file for you with 100% accuracy. The service offers several guarantees including your tax return backed for life, your maximum refund guaranteed, and 100% accurate calculations with reimbursement for any IRS penalties.
with: An expert files for you. $150, all in.
Whether your expert files for you in person or online, they'll get every tax break you deserve and your taxes done 100% right—guaranteed.
Once you've found a tax expert who understands your needs, you'll never have to start over.
Get unlimited tax help whenever you need it. Our experts are standing by, even on nights and weekends during tax season.
They'll file for you with 100% accuracy and audit support, guaranteed.
